long long solve(std::vector<std::vector<long long>> grid, long long k) {
    int m = grid.size();
    int n = grid[0].size();
    // Preprocess teleport_list
    std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<int, int>>>> teleport_list(m, std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<int, int>>>(n));
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
            for (int x = 0; x < m; ++x) {
                for (int y = 0; y < n; ++y) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleport_list[i][j].push_back( {x, y} );
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Dijkstra's algorithm
    std::priority_queue<std::pair<long long, int, int, long long>, std::vector<std::pair<long long, int, int, long long>>, std::greater<std::pair<long long, int, int, long long>>> pq;
    std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<long long>>> dist(m, std::vector<std::vector<long long>>(n, std::vector<long long>(k+1, LONG_LONG_MAX)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;
    pq.push( {0, 0, 0, 0} );

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        long long current_cost = pq.top().first;
        int i = pq.top().second;
        int j = pq.top().third;
        long long t = pq.top().fourth;
        pq.pop();

        // Check if we reached the destination
        if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) {
            return current_cost;
        }

        // Check if this state is already processed with a lower cost
        if (current_cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue;
        }

        // Move right
        if (j + 1 < n) {
            long long new_cost = current_cost + grid[i][j+1];
            if (new_cost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {
                dist[i][j+1][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {new_cost, i, j+1, t} );
            }
        }

        // Move down
        if (i + 1 < m) {
            long long new_cost = current_cost + grid[i+1][j];
            if (new_cost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {
                dist[i+1][j][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {new_cost, i+1, j, t} );
            }
        }

        // Teleport
        if (t < k) {
            for (auto [x, y] : teleport_list[i][j]) {
                long long new_t = t + 1;
                long long new_cost = current_cost;
                if (new_cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                    dist[x][y][new_t] = new_cost;
                    pq.push( {new_cost, x, y, new_t} );
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen)
    return -1;
}
